caption:
They think I’m just here to lecture on Victorian literature, but today, my classroom had other plans. 📚✨ It started with a spilled latte right as I bent over to pick up a dropped textbook, the fabric of my high-waisted wool skirt straining just enough to hint at the fullness of my hips without saying a word. 🍒 Then, the afternoon sun streamed through the tall arched windows of the university library, catching the dust motes dancing around me. I found myself trapped in a sudden rainstorm while walking back from my office, my blouse clinging slightly to my chest, accentuating the soft curve of my breasts hidden beneath the structured cotton. 🌧️🔥 A professor from the history department approached, his eyes lingering a little too long on the way my cardigan draped over my shoulders, creating a silhouette that was both academic and undeniably sexy. We ended up discussing Kant in the shadow of the ancient oak trees, his voice low and warm, while I tried not to smile too brightly, knowing how captivating I looked in this quiet, scholarly moment. 🍂💋 It wasn't just a lesson; it was a seduction of the mind and the body. Who knew academia could be this thrilling? 🎓❤️
